meaning: n.骞介粯,蹇冩儏,璇欒皭vt.杩庡悎,鐗靛氨,椤哄簲
examples: The movie mixes broad humor with romance.
It's filled with a really fun sense of humor.
Humor is vital to interpersonal relationships.
And how do you make sure that your humor is office-appropriate and will be well-received?
And he had a practical sense of humor that - he was always playing jokes.
